arts.ttl: Ange on team line-up decisions for Manchester City, including resting Heung-Min Son, Dejan Kulusevski and Djed Spence
arts.sum: So, given the amount of minutes the trio have racked up over the last few months, Ange explained that, as he now has players back from injury and can still field a strong team, tonight presents an opportunity to give the three players somewhat of a rest. Sonny, Djed and Dejan have played an incredible amount of football for us over the last few months as they have been able to avoid injury over a hectic period of games.

arts.ttl: Wednesday team news: Haaland starts but Foden, Son + Mazraoui don’t
arts.sum: Gameweek 27 continues with five matches The post Wednesday team news: Haaland starts but Foden, Son + Mazraoui don’t appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Bernardo Silva opens up on tough Man City season - 'hasn’t been the same'
arts.sum: Manchester City are fifth in the Premier League, 20 points from leaders Liverpool after winning just 13 of their 26 games so far

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Man City confirmed lineups: Erling Haaland, Phil Foden, Son Heung-min, Wilson Odobert decision made
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester City confirm their starting lineups for tonight's Premier League clash in North London.

arts.ttl: Haaland returns as City make four changes for Spurs
arts.sum: ● Having lost our first four Premier League games at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium without scoring a single goal, City won this exact fixture 2-0 last season. He’s just one strike away from netting his tenth away goal of the Premier League season, which would make him only the second player ever to score 10+ home goals and 10+ away goals in three consecutive campaigns.

arts.ttl: Doctor, 78, who claimed he could heal Kevin De Bruyne with 'mystic powers' is prosecuted after allegedly harassing the Man City star with several visits to his 70-acre home in Belgium
arts.sum: The first hearing was held on Wednesday afternoon at the Hasselt Criminal Court, with De Bruyne absent ahead of Manchester City's trip to Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes spots 'obvious' Kevin De Bruyne sign that points to imminent Man City exit
arts.sum: The Belgian legend is out of contract at the end of the season and could move on after a decade at the Etihad
James Maddison also returns to the starting XI, replacing Dejan Kulusevski, who starts the game amongst our substitutes. At full-back, Pedro Porro returns to the starting XI, replacing Djed Spence.
